ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "loyalty_card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's loyalty card */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the transaction */,
  "cashier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cashier who handled the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Total discount amount applied to the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Total tax amount for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_loyalty_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_card_id") REFERENCES loyalty_cards ("loyalty_card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the store */,
  "store_manager" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "store_email" TEXT /* Email address for the store */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Business hours of the store */,
  "last_inventory_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last inventory update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_cards" (
  "loyalty_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty card */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the loyalty program */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction using the loyalty card */,
  "points_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the loyalty points will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in a transaction */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "item_sales" REAL /* Sales amount for the product in the transaction */,
  "item_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the specific item */,
  "item_tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the specific item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_items_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES sales_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be triggered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the product details were last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)
